backend/main.mo: Empty Internet Computer actor; backend intentionally has no logic because the app is static-only.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented playback-related features, affected frontend files, dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten high-level summaries of all major frontend source files, components, pages, data modules, and context used in the app.
frontend/EDITING_GUIDE.md: Documentation explaining how to edit centralized mock data and static assets for the music platform prototype, with examples.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration defining the OKLCH-based color system, theme variables, and light/dark mode styles.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application setup configuring TanStack Router routes, global layout, theme provider, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component handling playback, auto-play on track change, seek controls, fallback audio, and UI state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Global layout with header navigation, footer, mobile nav, and a persistent AudioPlayer driven by PlaybackContext.
frontend/src/context/PlaybackContext.tsx: React context managing global playback state, exposing the current track and actions to play or close the audio player.
frontend/src/data/artistContent.ts: Defines static artist profiles keyed by artistId, including bios, images, follower counts, genres, and track lists with metadata and audio sources.
frontend/src/data/competitionsContent.ts: Provides mock data for active music competitions and a sample leaderboard, including prizes, categories, participants, and ranking stats.
frontend/src/data/homeContent.ts: Supplies home page mock content with featured artists and trending tracks, including basic artist info and track play metadata.
frontend/src/data/profileContent.ts: Contains mock user profile data, including profile details, uploaded tracks, followed artists, and followers lists.
frontend/src/data/rewardsContent.ts: Defines static rewards-related data such as badges, points transactions, redeemable rewards, and the user’s points balance and milestone.
frontend/src/data/types.ts: Declares shared TypeScript interfaces for artists, tracks, profiles, competitions, rewards, and related entities used across the frontend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Implements a React hook that creates and caches a backend actor using React Query, switching between anonymous and authenticated identities and invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are used in this static prototype.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind CSS base styles and defines extensive CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors, layout, and component styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that initializes React, wraps the app with React Query and Internet Identity providers, and mounts it to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/ArtistProfilePage.tsx: Renders a detailed artist profile page with header info, follow/share actions, and a list of popular tracks, loading artist data by route param and integrating playback controls.
frontend/src/pages/CompetitionsPage.tsx: Displays active music competitions and a leaderboard using card and table layouts, driven by static competition and leaderboard data.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Implements the main landing page with a hero section, navigation CTAs, featured artists, and trending tracks, including playback and routing interactions.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Shows the logged-in user’s profile with avatar, stats, editable info, and tabbed sections for tracks, following, and followers, using static profile data.
frontend/src/pages/RewardsPage.tsx: Presents a rewards and achievements dashboard with points balance, progress to milestones, badges, stats, and redeemable rewards based on static data.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Implements a static Upload page UI with guidelines, disabled file dropzones, and a detailed track metadata form using reusable UI components and icons. All inputs and actions are intentionally disabled to represent a prototype upload flow.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with class-based dark mode, container settings, OKLCH-based theme colors via CSS variables, custom radii, animations, and shadows. Includes typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the high-level project state and versioned summary of Survikas as a static frontend music platform prototype. Enumerates existing UI features, routing, theming, pages, and notes the presence of placeholder ICP/DFINITY backend scaffolding.
